text:
Doyen's Virility Pills 長老の精力増強薬 - is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and so is required for a player to complete the game. 
__NOTOC__

Summary

Doyen's Virility Pills 長老の精力増強薬 - This card allows the caster to summon forth a vial of Doyen's Virility Pills. When consumed, each pill makes a certain part of your body very frisky. Both endurance and frequency is enhanced. These effects are temporary and have adverse effects on the body. Each vial summoned contains 500 pills.

|-

|No.068 :: Doyen's Virility Pills 
This medicine, makes part of the body extremely energetic. Causing undisputed number of times and endurance. 500 tables in a bottle.
|}
